docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MCGOEY, CHRIS E. MCGOEY SECURITY CONSULTING AS TO DEFENDANT GUGLIELMINO, MICHAEL J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-24-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CONTINUANCE REQUEST BY DEFT SUBMITTED FOR APPROVAL. 9/21/01 @1:30PM. FEES PAID.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-24-2001, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO SEP-21-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GUGLIELMINO, MICHAEL J.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCGOEY, CHRIS E. MCGOEY SECURITY CONSULTING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUGLIELMINO, MICHAEL J. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00, DEFENDANT STIPULATED TO THE JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GUGLIELMINO, MICHAEL J.
